name: the clearing
identity: A secluded natural space where the player and others gather to perform a ritualistic process, symbolizing a transition from conflict to resolution.
current_status: The clearing is the site of a delicate and introspective process where the group works to disrupt and dismantle a lingering pattern within an individual, avoiding further harm.

description.value: A secluded natural space where the player and others gather to perform a ritualistic process, symbolizing a transition from conflict to resolution.

volatile_state.condition: Still and contemplative, with a focus on the process of dismantling and allowing natural decay.
volatile_state.current_activity: Performing a ritualistic process to dismantle a lingering pattern within an individual.
